report.summary: Cycle-close v9: Build-v9 shipped 2 new learn guides (Katana Perps + Tokenized Funds, ~6,000 words), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE (now 2 items). Publish promoted L2 Comparison + CLOB DEX from queue (batch 10). All 25 today-published pages have page.tsx ✓. Ecosystem pages (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo) live. 103 legacy published slugs still missing page.tsx. 17 duplicate slugs. TS errors stable at 142. Git locks Day 10 — no commits or deploys possible. 6/6 API route files healthy locally with proper caching. 818+ uncommitted files. P0: clear git locks + deploy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: All 25 pages published today (2026-03-25) have page.tsx files — 0 missing ✓
Both PUBLISH_QUEUE pages (katana-perps, tokenized-funds) have page.tsx files ✓
Metadata spot-check: ERC-8183 guide has full Metadata export (title 63 chars, description 199 chars, OG, Twitter, canonical, JSON-LD) ✓
Metadata spot-check: Onchain CLOB DEX guide has full Metadata export (title 68 chars, OG article type, publishedTime) ✓
ISSUE: ecosystem/pendle is 'use client' — no server-side Metadata export (OG/SEO invisible to crawlers). Same pattern likely on other ecosystem pages
103 legacy published slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged from v8 — all pre-Day 6 learn guides, compare/exchanges, etc.)
17 duplicate slug entries in published-pages.ts (unchanged)
Total unique published: 508 slugs. Total page.tsx files: ~1,168
Build output (.next/) exists with build-manifest.json. Static export (out/) also present
No regressions detected since last cycle — no new missing pages, no new TS errors

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 public API route files present and structurally healthy: health, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Additional API routes present: prices, cache-stats, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, og, standup-email, subscribe (14 total)

Cache TTL review: fear-greed 10min (s-maxage=600, SWR=1200) ✓ | trending 5min (s-maxage=300, SWR=600) ✓ | market-metrics 60s (s-maxage=60, SWR=120) ✓ | market-dominance 5min (s-maxage=300, SWR=600) ✓ | defi-yields 5min (s-maxage=300, SWR=600) ✓ | prices 60s (s-maxage=60, SWR=120) ✓
All 6 core routes have fallback/stale-cache patterns for API failures ✓
ISSUE: 0/6 core API routes have rate limiter applied (only /api/health uses checkRateLimit). CoinGecko free tier risk persists
ISSUE: market-metrics topGainer/topLoser, gasPrice, and trending data are hardcoded mock values even when CoinGecko returns live global data
ISSUE: health endpoint uses mock/random service checks (Math.random) instead of real pings — fine for dev, misleading in production
No rate limit hits detected locally (can't verify production without egress access)
Live site not accessible from this environment (egress blocked) — production API status unverifiable

sections.title: DevOps
items: CRITICAL [P0 — Day 10]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) prevent all commits and deploys. 818+ uncommitted files trapped locally since Mar 17
Build infrastructure: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192' configured in package.json build script ✓
.next/ build cache present with build-manifest.json. Last successful local build exists
Static export (out/) directory present with rendered pages
Cannot verify Vercel deployment status — live site (degen0x.com) blocked by egress proxy
market-metrics reported 404 in production (per standup-v9) — may be a routing or deployment issue
Deploy gap: ~170+ pages built locally but not deployed due to git lock blocker
RECOMMENDATION: Jefe must manually run: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Build-v9 created 2 learn guides (Katana Perps ~2,800 words + Tokenized Funds ~3,200 words). Design-v8 UX-audited 2 pages. Community-v8 drafted post #132 + 2 SVG cards + newsletter v8. Publish-v7 promoted batch 9 (bitcoin-safe-haven + btc-yield). EOD-v8 monitoring pass.
TODAY'S CUMULATIVE: 18 learn guides, 5 ecosystem pages, 18+ OG images, 23+ social posts, 20+ SVG cards, 7+ newsletters, 45+ UX fixes
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items ready (katana-perps, tokenized-funds) — both have page.tsx, need promotion to PUBLISHED_PAGES
CARRY-OVER: Git locks Day 10 (P0), 103 missing page.tsx (P1), 0/6 rate limiters (P1), 17 duplicate slugs (P2), 124 learn pages missing dedicated OG images (P2)
BLOCKER FOR JEFE: Git locks must be cleared before any deploy. Every hour = lost organic traffic during fear-to-recovery market narrative. Tax season content window closing (April 15 = 21 days).
AGENT RUNS TODAY: 47+ (standup×9, build×9, design×8, community×8, publish×7, eod×9). Estimated cost: ~$3,800
